Blooming Buds · Indoor Golf Club

GreenTeeRichmond Center

Glittering, brightly colored, alluring flowers bloom splendidly.
An indoor golf club where the game comes into bloom after dark.

Book a Bay Explore the Spaces
Scroll

Seed to Blossom

Every visit begins as a seed.

Under ten thousand lights, your game blooms.

GreenTee Richmond Center brings together tour-grade simulation, private play, and coaching across two floors of botanical luxury.

Blooming Buds·Seed to Blossom·Carried by the Wind·Sunlight Through a Forest·Warm Sunshine on the Western River·Iconic 15· Blooming Buds·Seed to Blossom·Carried by the Wind·Sunlight Through a Forest·Warm Sunshine on the Western River·Iconic 15·

Rates & Hours

Book by the hour,
play all year.

Simple hourly rates for bays and rooms. Doors open 06:00 to 24:00, every day of the year.

Bays & Rooms

General Bay · DayWeekdays 06:00 to 17:00 · up to 4 players
$60/ hour
General Bay · TwilightWeekdays from 17:00, and all day on weekends
$75/ hour
VIP Room · 2FPrivate simulator room for up to 6 guests
$120/ hour
VVIP Suite · 2FRooms 1 to 4, with a dedicated host
From $200/ hour
Putting ZoneComplimentary with any bay or room booking
Included

Rates are per bay or room, not per player. Clubs and shoes are available at the Pro Shop.

Hours & Availability

Open Daily365 days a year, rain or shine
06:00 to 24:00
Last Tee TimeFinal one-hour bookings each night
22:30
Peak HoursWeekday evenings and weekends fill first. Reserve 3 to 5 days ahead.
18:00 to 22:00
Walk-InsSubject to availability. Mornings are quietest.
Welcome
ReservationsOnline, or by phone at +1 000 000 0000
Up to 14 days

The first Crystal Jade Palace in North America opens on the promenade this September, led by a Michelin-starred kitchen.

Dining at the Center

Crystal Jade Palace

Cantonese fine dining on the promenade. The first Crystal Jade Palace in North America, led by a Michelin-starred kitchen.

Accolades

room by room.
